summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of visual redesign across all sidebar pages. All pages load correctly with modern gradient stat cards, shadow-sm borders, and styled tables. No JavaScript console errors from application code. Both employer and actuary logins work correctly.
passed_tests: Login page renders correctly with modern styling
Employer login works (fajju2001@gmail.com / test123)
Actuary login works (emily.park@parkreed.com / test123)
Dashboard loads with gradient stat cards (Total Employees, Full-Time, FTE Count, ALE Status, MEC Coverage)
Dashboard shows Eligibility Status, Compliance Checks, and Risk Alerts cards with gradient top-bars
Plan Library page loads with summary stat cards (Total Plans, Medical, Dental, Vision) and plan cards
Enrollment Review page loads with stat cards (Total Employees, Eligible, Ineligible) and employee eligibility table
ALE Calculator page loads with gradient stat cards, department breakdown table, and employee roster
MEC Checker page loads with form on left and results panel on right
MV Calculator page loads correctly with SBC upload and plan details form
Affordability page loads correctly with employee premium details form
Certifications page loads correctly
IRS Forms page loads with summary cards (FT Employees, ALE Status, 1095-C Forms, Generated) and tab navigation
Census Export page loads correctly with export history
Employee Profile page loads when clicking an employee from the Employees table
Actuary Marketplace page loads with Directory/My Requests/Active tabs for employer
Actuary Dashboard loads correctly for actuary role with Pending/In Progress/Completed stat cards
Compliance Workflow page loads with step-by-step workflow items
Employees page loads with stat cards and employee table
Sidebar navigation works for all pages - clicking each nav item navigates correctly
No JavaScript console errors on any page (only CDN/font network requests which are normal)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load correctly, no JS errors)

mocked_apis_list: Mock payroll data in ALE calculator

context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual redesign testing complete. All sidebar pages verified: Dashboard, Plan Library, Enrollment Review, ALE Calculator, MEC Checker, MV Calculator, Affordability, Certifications, IRS Forms, Census Export, Employee Profile, Actuary Marketplace, Compliance Workflow, Employees, and Login. Modern gradient stat cards with shadow-sm borders and gradient top-bars are rendering correctly across all pages. Both employer and actuary roles tested successfully.
